MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $325.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/10/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-07-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian L. Levine (650-813-5600) of Morrison & Forester appearing via CourtCall for Chase Home Finance, LLC, plaintiff and moving party; No other appearance

Tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT CHASE HOME FINANCE, LLC DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to all 8 causes of actions.
1st Injunctive relief not cause of action and not likelyhood of prevailing.
2nd failed to amend as ordered by court.
3rd and 8th fails to plead any facts suggesting, content or quasi contract.
4th Bank did not initiate foreclosure & notice of defaul not filed. See Aceves v. U.S. Bank.
5th Failed to amend as ordered by the court.
6th 2925.5 not applicable no notice of default and no initiation.
7th Per Citibank v. United Omaha Life Insurance, plaintiff can not plead around deficiencies by claiming B & P 17200 Violation. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Not Reported

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Continued To Mar-23-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to February 8, 2012 at 9:30am to be heard in Department 501. The moving party is to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 by January 26, 201 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C). (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR #11604
